title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at United India Insurance

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at United India Insurance
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, United India Insurance in Chennai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About United India Insurance:
United India Insurance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with United India Insurance!
